summary: Validated new Ganancia formula and historic months feature. Backend formula (total*0.81)-(cost*qty) returns correct values: qty=2 -> 2100, qty=4 -> -3900 (correct per spec, sale at loss). New endpoints /dashboard/historic-months and /dashboard/historic-data return 200 with proper data. Frontend shows 'Ganancia' and 'Compras' labels, 'Total Mes' and 'Histórico' buttons work, and Histórico view renders month cards (JUN 2026 visible).
passed: Auth login admin@ventas.com works (200, token returned)
GET /api/dashboard/historic-data?year=2026&month=6 -> 200, returns store_a, store_b, general metrics
Formula validation qty=2 total=10000 cost=3000 -> utilidades=2100.0 (matches expected 2100)
Formula validation qty=4 total=10000 cost=3000 -> utilidades=-3900.0 (correct per spec when cost*qty > total*0.81)
POST/PUT/DELETE /api/sales work and metrics update accordingly
Frontend 'Ganancia' label present (2 occurrences for Store A and B)
Click on Histórico shows month cards (1 card for JUN 2026 detected via data-testid=historic-month-2026-6)
notes: Bug original ('valor negativo al aumentar cantidad') resuelto. La nueva fórmula puede dar negativo SOLO si cost_price*qty > total*0.81, que representa una venta con pérdida real (comportamiento esperado por el spec). El sidebar 00:00 reset no se probó porque no fue implementado (documentado en spec).
